<noinclude> ==Usage== When you find a dead external link within a paragraph, you may place this template after the link. This template is similar to {{tl|fact}}, so it will not disrupt the flow of the text in the article.
To insert this template into an article, place this right ''after'' the dead link: <tt class="plainlinks"><nowiki>{</nowiki>{dl-s|<font color=red>''INSERT THE DEAD LINK HERE''</font>}}</tt>
[[Category: External link templates]]</noinclude>

<sup><nowiki>[</nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Dead external links|''link is dead'']]</sup>{{#if: {{{1|}}}| <sup>-</sup> [http://web.archive.org/web/*/{{{1}}} <sup>''view history''</sup>]}}<sup><nowiki>]</nowiki></sup>{{#if: {{NAMESPACE}} || [[Category:Articles with dead external links]] }}
<noinclude> ==Usage== When you find a dead external link within a paragraph, you may place this template '''after the link''' (not in place of it). This template is similar to {{tl|fact}}, so it will not disrupt the flow of the text in the article.
To insert this template into an article, place this right ''after'' the dead link: <tt class="plainlinks"><nowiki>{</nowiki>{dl-s|<font color=red>''INSERT THE DEAD LINK HERE''</font>}}</tt>
[[Category: External link templates]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Implementing category for transclusions of this template with an invalid date parameter set
Adding protection template (Article was semi-protected by [[User:Cenarium]]) (Proof: http://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Log&page=Template:Dead_link )
revision.text: {{fix |link=Wikipedia:Dead external links |text=dead link |post-text={{#if: {{{url<includeonly>|</includeonly>}}}|  – [http://web.archive.org/web/*/{{{url|}}} ''history'']}} |title=The preceding link appears to be dead |date={{{date|}}} |cat=[[Category:All articles with dead external links]] |cat-date=Category:Articles with dead external links}}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> </noinclude> <noinclude>{{pp-semi-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Please stop inserting line break into the template!

revision.comment: template will from now on use "from" instead of "since", in connection with global transition from "since" to "from"
editprotected request per target page move - http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Linkrot?&diff=321116918&oldid=320839347
Fix link to redirect to increase performance.

revision.comment: [[Module:Unsubst|Unsubstifying]] template, so {{subst:Dead link}} results in {{Dead link|date=...}}
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$N=Dead link |date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Fix | subst = {{subst:substcheck}} | special = [{{#if: {{{url|}}}|[http://web.archive.org/web/*/{{{url|}}} dead link]|[[Wikipedia:Link rot|dead link]]}}] | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = [[Category:All articles with dead external links]] | cat-date = Category:Articles with dead external links}} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: adding fix-attempted parameter per talk page
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Kaldari|Kaldari]] ([[User talk:Kaldari|talk]]) to last version by Debresser
Reverted [[WP:AGF|good faith]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Cyberpower678|Cyberpower678]] ([[User talk:Cyberpower678|talk]]): Oops. Misclick. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
[[WP:BOLD|Boldy]] expand fix-attempted parameter to make template display [permanent dead link].
Fix for |=foo bug (for example {{dead link|=January 2021}} transcluding [[Template:January 2021]])
Boldly changed 'since' to 'tagged'; "dead link since <date>" is misleading, since it could have been dead for years before someone noticed and tagged it.
thin space needed between last letter and end bracket
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
